## Summary

Describe the change directly.

## Type of change

- [ ] Rule change
- [ ] Decoder change
- [ ] List example change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Structural or maintenance change

## Files changed

List the main paths changed.

## Why this change is needed

Explain the problem being fixed or the coverage being added.

## Validation

Describe exactly how this was validated.

Examples:
- `wazuh-logtest`
- daemon config checks
- redacted sample event
- alert output review
- documentation-only change

## False positive considerations

Explain any likely tuning requirements, expected noise, or deployment caveats.

## Redaction check

Confirm that this pull request does not include:

- [ ] secrets
- [ ] private IPs
- [ ] internal hostnames
- [ ] customer names
- [ ] sensitive screenshots
- [ ] unredacted raw logs

## Notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
